title: Missing credential authorization check in dynamic-node-parameters allows foreign credential replay
description: The dynamic-node-parameters service's request-sanitizing routine refineResourceIds() validates only the projectId and workflowId references supplied by the authenticated caller, scrubbing them when the user lacks project/workflow scopes. It performs no authorization check on the credentials supplied in the same request payload, even though those credentials (an INodeCredentials object containing a credential id) are passed straight through to getWorkflow() and attached to the resolved node, where the backend decrypts and uses them in a helper execution path whose destination URL the caller also controls. An authenticated user with access to a shared workflow can therefore supply a foreign credential id, forcing the backend to authenticate against attacker-controlled infrastructure with another user's credential and exfiltrate a reusable API key.
